mapper.sql: select part_id, part_code, part_name, category, spec_model, part_unit, purchase_price, sale_price, current_stock, min_stock, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from wh_part
mapper.select: where del_flag = '0' order by status asc, part_code asc
mapper.update:
update wh_part set del_flag = '2', update_time = sysdate() where part_id in
#{partId}
mapper.select:
select count(1) from wh_stock_flow where del_flag = '0' and part_id in
#{partId}
